meaning: adj.闈炶偪鐦ょ殑,闈炶偪鐦ゅ紩璧风殑
examples: We observed that CD335 was highly specific for NK cells in nonneoplastic tissues.
Objective to explore the clinical characteristics of nonneoplastic cystic lesions such as adrenal cysts and hematomas.
Results:(1)Nonneoplastic cysts and cystadenomas were characterized by thin-walled cystic mass, cystic wall and septa were thin and regular.
